headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting Essex Property Trust Stock Will Climb or Sink?
summary: Although Essex Property Trust has lagged the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain cautiously constructive on the stock’s long-term outlook.

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats: May 2026
summary: The Dividend Aristocrats underperformed SPY YTD, returning 3.34% versus SPY's 10.39%, though 22 Aristocrats still posted double-digit gains.
